name: Clutter Puzzle Magazine Vol. 16 No. 2 Collector's Edition
short_description: Jam-packed with over 1,400 fun and challenging puzzles! Explore revamped Spot The Differences Puzzles, test your skills with Abstract Squares and Circle Puzzles, and relish timeless favorites such as Sliders, Square Jigsaws and Box Quotes.
detailed_description:
Clutter Puzzle Magazine Vol. 16 No. 2 Collector's Edition brings you more than 1,400 fun and challenging puzzles! Explore revamped Spot The Differences Puzzles, test your skills with Abstract Squares and Circle Puzzles, and relish timeless favorites such as Sliders, Square Jigsaws and Box Quotes.

Indulge in hours of entertainment...The options let you play Clutter the way you want. And Favorites allow you to collect the puzzles you want to play again and again. Dive in! You've never seen Clutter this fun & challenging.



  • New Object Sets & Many New Gameplay Modes
  • Enjoy over 1400 levels and master a very challenging 100 level Main Quest
  • A laid-back No-Motion Old-School Quest
  • Discover the all-new Clutter Gap Puzzles.
  • Revamped & highly addicting Spot The Difference Puzzle
  • Hundreds of picture puzzles and 100 new Box Quotes puzzles
  • Experience endless gameplay with randomly generated levels!
  • Another Great Soundtrack with a Cinematic Feel.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Portuguese - Brazil
